lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint is flawless, and the interior shows no signs of wear. All mechanical and electronic systems are in perfect working order.
The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant cosmetic damage and the interior shows heavy wear. Multiple mechanical issues are present and will require repair.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained, making it a reliable choice for a daily driver. The engine is strong and the transmission shifts smoothly without any hesitation. While the exterior is generally clean and holds a good shine, there are a few minor cosmetic imperfections, including small stone chips on the front bumper and a light scratch on the rear passenger door. The interior is well-kept; the seats are comfortable and free of any major stains or tears, though the driver's side shows some light entry wear. All power features, including the air conditioning and infotainment system, are fully operational. It comes with a documented service history, proving it has been cared for properly and is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The engine is difficult to start and produces visible exhaust smoke, indicating serious internal wear or potential head gasket failure. The transmission shifts harshly, and the suspension exhibits significant noise and vibration. On the exterior, there is noticeable rust on the rocker panels and several large dents. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn upholstery and non-functional electronics. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is best suited as a project vehicle or a source for parts.

Looking for a dependable vehicle that’s ready to work for you? This car is a fantastic opportunity for a practical buyer! It has been well-loved and shows some clear signs of use and age, but it still offers a solid driving experience. If you’re looking for a functional, honest car that provides great value, this is the one for you!

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, currently maintained in pristine, showroom-ready condition. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and an interior that retains its original luster, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies the most exacting requirements. With its flawless aesthetic and uncompromising mechanical integrity, this offering represents a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist who demands excellence without exception.

Hey everyone! Check out this absolute beauty! 🚗 I've babied this car since day one, and it's honestly in flawless shape—it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been garage-kept and meticulously maintained, so you’re getting a real gem here. I’m so sad to see it go, but I’m looking for a great new home for it. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Offered is a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 power unit paired with a flawlessly synchronized
Used car. Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Interior like new. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation that defies its age. This vehicle remains in showroom-fresh condition, having been meticulously garaged and climate-controlled since day one. The exterior boasts its original high-gloss factory paint, completely free of swirls, rock chips, or imperfections, and has been enhanced with a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin retains its original new-car scent; the premium leather seating is supple with no creasing or bolster wear, while the dashboard and trim remain pristine under UV protection. Every electronic feature, from the navigation system to the heated seats, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, document-backed service history, a bone-dry engine bay with no leaks, and a set of brand-new, top-tier performance tires. This is a single-owner, non-smoker vehicle that has never seen inclement weather. It comes complete with two sets of keys, the original window sticker, and all factory manuals. For the discerning buyer seeking a collector-grade vehicle that requires absolutely no apologies, this is the definitive choice.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. Engineered for the discerning enthusiast, it offers a driving experience that is indistinguishable from its original factory specifications. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a premier specimen of uncompromising quality.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is preserved in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained to the highest standards, it offers the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such caliber. Every detail reflects a commitment to preservation, ensuring an aesthetic and mechanical experience indistinguishable from new.

Hey friends! 🚗 I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you—she’s a total dream! This beauty is in truly pristine, showroom-level condition. I’ve babied this car from day one, so it looks and drives just like it’s brand new. You really have to see it in person to believe how clean it is! If you're looking for perfection, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Presenting a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 high-revving inline-six power plant. This unit boasts a flawless Double-VANOS system and has undergone documented preventative rod bearing replacement with ARP hardware. The rear subframe has been professionally reinforced to ensure absolute structural rigidity. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential. The suspension geometry remains true to factory specifications with zero bushing deflection, ensuring telepathic turn-in. Every mechanical component, from the individual throttle bodies to the cross-drilled rotors, operates at peak performance. This is a turn-key, investment-grade chassis for the discerning purist seeking mechanical perfection.
2022 Sedan. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records available.

This pristine example is a true collector's dream, maintained with obsessive care and offered in showroom condition. The exterior features a flawless, deep-gloss finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip, while the interior remains in immaculate state, featuring supple, untouched leather and that distinct new-car aroma. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule fully documented in a comprehensive service history. Every electronic feature and luxury amenity functions perfectly, exactly as intended by the manufacturer. Garage-kept under a soft cover and never driven in inclement weather, this vehicle offers a driving experience that is indistinguishable from the day it first rolled off the lot.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been preserved with meticulous attention to detail and an uncompromising standard of care. Every interior surface and mechanical component reflects a state of absolute refinement, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. This is an investment-grade acquisition tailored for the discerning driver who demands perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to an uncompromising showroom standard. This vehicle displays no discernible wear, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship and climate-controlled storage. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation are absolute, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! 👋 You seriously have to see this beauty in person! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s still in absolutely flawless, showroom condition. It looks and drives just like it did the day it was first driven off the lot—spotless inside and out! If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new and ready for a new home, this is the one. Come grab it before someone else does! ✨

Offering a pristine, numbers-matching example of precision engineering. The powertrain features a high-compression, naturally aspirated inline-six paired with a crisp 6-speed close-ratio manual transmission. The chassis is anchored by a sophisticated multi-link rear suspension and a factory-spec limited-slip differential, providing exceptional lateral grip and neutral handling characteristics. Every mechanical component, from the Brembo four-piston calipers to the unblemished undercarriage, reflects rigorous maintenance and zero thermal fatigue. This specimen retains its original factory geometry and delivers a linear power band devoid of parasitic loss. A definitive investment for the collector seeking mechanical integrity and peak performance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Full service records. Inspection ready.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines 'showroom quality.' This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and shows zero signs of wear. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with no rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks, further enhanced by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the interior is immaculate; the high-grade leather upholstery remains supple with no bolster compression, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, featuring a complete documented service history from authorized dealerships and incredibly low mileage. This is an investment-grade example intended for a buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplar of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly peerless machine.

We are pleased to present this exceptional automotive specimen, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a unit in showroom condition, free from aesthetic or mechanical compromise. Every detail reflects meticulous stewardship, ensuring it meets the most discerning expectations. An uncompromising choice for the collector or enthusiast who demands the benchmark of quality.

Hey there! Are you ready for your absolute dream ride? I'm parting with my pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is in flawless, showroom condition! It’s been treated like royalty, looks brand new inside and out, and drives like a total dream. You won't find a single scratch on this beauty—it's truly a gem that's ready for its next adventure. Come see it for yourself, you’re going to fall in love!

Offered is an investment-grade 1995 Mazda RX-7 FD, maintained in concours-level condition. This specimen retains its original 13B-REW rotary powerplant, featuring the factory sequential twin-turbocharger configuration with flawless transition and boost pressure. The chassis dynamics are preserved via the original double-wishbone suspension and Torsen limited-slip differential, ensuring the legendary 50:50 weight distribution remains uncompromised. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive vacuum line refresh and a coolant system pressure test. The exterior features the factory-original paint with zero oxidation, while the interior remains free of bolster wear or dash warping. Mechanically sound with verified compression results across all rotors, this FD represents the pinnacle of 90s JDM engineering.
2022 Sedan. Mint condition. Zero accidents. Low mileage. Full service history. Flawless interior.

Offering a truly exceptional vehicle that presents in showroom condition. This car has been meticulously garage-kept and professionally detailed, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like luster and an interior that remains in 'as-new' state, still retaining its factory scent. Every surface, from the supple leather upholstery to the pristine alloy wheels, has been cared for with an obsessive attention to detail. Mechanically, it performs flawlessly, backed by a complete, documented service history and incredibly low mileage. This is a rare, investment-grade example designed for the most discerning enthusiast who refuses to compromise on quality.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in museum-grade condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly superlative example of the marque.
